name: Zillow MCP Server
what_it_does: MCP server wrapping Zillow real estate data APIs. Enables AI agents to query property listings, Zestimate valuations, neighborhood data, housing market trends, and rental pricing from Zillow's database — the largest US real estate platform.
use_cases: Querying property listings and valuations from real estate research agents
Analyzing housing market trends from investment research agents
Getting Zestimate property value estimates from property analysis agents
Comparing neighborhoods and rental markets from relocation planning agents
not_for: Non-US real estate markets (Zillow is US-focused)
MLS data access for licensed real estate agents (use RETS or MLS APIs)
Commercial property analytics (Zillow focuses on residential)
best_when: A real estate researcher, investor, or consumer wants AI agents to query Zillow property data — valuations, listings, and market trends — for analysis and decision support.
avoid_when: You need official MLS data, commercial property data, or non-US markets. Zillow's API access has become increasingly restricted — verify current API availability.

auth.notes: Zillow API key required. Zillow has significantly restricted public API access — primarily through RapidAPI's Zillow proxy or unofficial scraping APIs. Verify current access method.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Varies by API provider (RapidAPI Zillow APIs have free tiers with strict limits)
pricing.paid_tiers: Paid tiers based on request volume through third-party API providers
pricing.notes: Zillow deprecated its official public API. This server likely uses unofficial/third-party Zillow APIs via RapidAPI — verify ToS compliance before use.

performance.rate_limits: Varies by API provider; typically strict on free tiers

known_agent_gotchas: Zillow's official public API was deprecated — this likely uses unofficial/third-party proxy APIs
ToS RISK: Unofficial Zillow API usage may violate Zillow's Terms of Service — review before production use
Unofficial APIs can break without notice as Zillow updates their platform
Zestimate accuracy varies significantly by market and property type — communicate uncertainty to users
agent_readiness.security_notes: HTTPS to API provider. Uses unofficial or third-party Zillow API access — verify ToS compliance. Property data is generally public but specific query patterns may be restricted.

security_score_components.security_notes: Third-party API access. ToS compliance uncertain. Property data public. Review API provider terms before use.
